issues.description: DSL is missing the first effect entirely. Card has two distinct effects: (1) a reactive once-per-turn effect triggered when this Character would be removed by opponent's effect, and (2) a When Attacking effect. Only the second effect is partially represented.
The first effect should have trigger='Counter' (reactive effect preventing removal), not 'OnAttack'. This is a replacement effect, not an attack trigger.
Missing condition to enforce 'Once Per Turn' restriction. Should include a TurnCount or equivalent mechanism to limit activation.
First effect should target 'Self' (this Character receives −2000 power), not opponent's Character. Target scope is wrong.
First effect duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' (during this turn), not 'EndOfTurn'.
Second effect specifies 'up to 1' opponent Character, but target scope lacks quantity constraint. Should be 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' with maxCount:1.
Second effect duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' (during this turn), not 'EndOfTurn', per the text 'during this turn'.
